holdings.infoBox: DBAW is an equity ETF with a total of 1798 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.80%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 2.84%, Samsung Electronics at 2.73%, SK hynix at 2.19%, and ASML Holding at 1.90%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI All World ex US Hedged Equity ETF (DBAW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap companies from developed and emerging markets, excluding the US. The fund hedges out its exposure to the underlying currencies, relative to the USD. DBAW was launched on Jan 23, 2014 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI ex USA (1998) 100% Hedged to USD Net Variant
